actions.intent: Start with the upper-right centerline support group instead of broad side farming.
Open the lower puppy's left side and cash a dock-safe B triple on the intended route.
Open the lower puppy's right side and extract the urgent lower target first.
Pivot upward through the shared center lane after the lower rescue resolves.
Clear a left-side support group that breaks ice and keeps dock pressure controlled.
Bring the upper puppy to one-clear-away through the center-left route.
Take a controlled support clear while preserving the final upper route.
Open the final upper side and complete the lower-first central lane solve.

notes: Designer-approved intended path after telemetry tuning: central route work first, lower puppy before upper, no reliance on broad side farming.
